name: exemplar-memory
description: Persistent memory for Codex via Exemplar memory_tool MCP. Remembers preferences and facts across sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Long-term scoped memory for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Store and recall user preferences, standing rules, and explicit facts across Codex sessions via memory_tool (semantic search, org-isolated).
defaultPrompt: Remember that I prefer bullet-point answers.
What do you know about my formatting preferences?
Search memory for my UI theme preferences.
